regions.text: The earth is far older than we can imagine. Time stretches long into the past and far into the future.
(Illustration: A person sitting by a lake among ancient mountains, contemplating the passage of time).
Seventy years is long compared to a minute, but nothing compared to a stone. A Chinese poem says: 'Quickly the years fly past forever, Here forever is this spring morning.'
poem: a way of expressing a person's complete thoughts and feelings perfectly.
